tweets.author: bit-by-bitcoin.bsky.social
tweets.text: Hard money is money that's difficult to produce more of — gold, silver, Bitcoin. Because it's hard to make, it tends to hold its value over time. Soft money is money that's easy to produce more of — paper, digital dollars, any currency a government can print at will.

tweets.text: Interesting share. The challenge with 5-minute Bitcoin predictions is the signal-to-noise ratio - short-term price action is heavily influenced by orderflow and liquidity dynamics. Longer timeframe context remains essential for informed decision-making.
